title: Property Tests, Algebraic Laws, and Pipeline Diagnostics · Transformation Lens: Performance Properties
summary: Prove a normalization and aggregation library across generated changed cases and injected faults. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp performance properties increment in a law-oriented regression and diagnostics suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure bounded consumption and scaling without turning timing noise into correctness claims.
Reduce a failing input to the smallest case that still violates the property.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
